channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Uddhav Sena Faces Internal Challenges as MPs’ Meetings Raise Concerns
item.description: The news article, which unfortunately I couldn’t access the full content of, seems to be reporting on some tension brewing within the Uddhav Sena faction of the Shiv Sena party. Reports suggest that r...

item.title: Woman Injured After Being Struck by Vehicle at Etobicoke Bus Shelter
item.description: A pedestrian was seriously injured in Etobicoke after being struck by a vehicle at a bus shelter on April 25, 2026. The incident occurred in the early morning hours, and emergency services were quick ...

item.title: Insider trading allegations raise concerns for growing prediction markets
item.description: Prediction markets, once a niche financial tool, have rapidly expanded into a multibillion-dollar industry backed by Wall Street investments. Recently, the sector has faced mounting scrutiny due to in...

item.title: Study Proposes Early-Universe Gravitational Waves as a Source of Dark Matter
item.description: A new study from researchers at Johannes Gutenberg University Mainz and Swansea University proposes a novel explanation for the origin of dark matter, one of the most persistent mysteries in modern ph...

item.title: Novo Nordisk rolls out awareness campaign and new obesity treatment in the Philippines
item.description: Novo Nordisk has officially launched its “Live Lighter” campaign in the Philippines, alongside the introduction of a new treatment option for obesity. The initiative aims to raise awareness about obes...

item.title: Impact of the US-Israel conflict on Iran: Women face heightened risks, displacement, and repression
item.description: The ongoing conflict involving the United States, Israel, and Iran has triggered a severe humanitarian crisis, with women and girls in Iran facing particularly harsh consequences. While wars are often...

item.title: Mississauga Motorcyclist Hospitalized Following Collision with Car
item.description: A serious traffic collision occurred in Mississauga, Ontario, involving a motorcyclist and a car. Emergency services responded promptly to the scene, providing urgent medical attention to the motorcyc...

item.title: Man City reach FA Cup final while Arsenal reclaim top spot in Premier League
item.description: For this past weekend for Premier League, Arsenal don show say dem still dey serious after dem small setback last week. Dem beat Newcastle United 1-0 for Emirates Stadium, make dem climb back top of t...

item.title: Anti-immigration protests rise in South Africa as tensions with African migrants grow
item.description: For South Africa, wahala dey as anti-immigration protests don increase, especially for cities like Johannesburg and Durban. Some locals dey shout say African migrants dey take their jobs and even thei...

item.title: Raghav Chadha Leaves AAP to Join BJP Amid Political and Legal Challenges in Punjab
item.description: Raghav Chadha, a prominent leader of the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP), has decided to join the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), signalling a significant shift in Punjab politics. This move comes after a series ...

item.title: Study finds land sources dominate airborne microplastic emissions worldwide
item.description: A recent study from the University of Vienna sheds new light on the origins and behavior of airborne microplastics, challenging previous assumptions about their primary sources. Microplastics—tiny pla...

item.title: Authorities investigating hate-motivated incident at Vaughan's Sephardic Kehila Centre
item.description: On the morning of Saturday, April 25, 2026, York Regional Police were called to the Sephardic Kehila Centre on Bathurst Street in Vaughan, Ontario, following reports of a forced entry attempt. Accordi...

item.title: Demonstration at RAF Fairford over US operations against Iran
item.description: Hundreds of demonstrators gathered near RAF Fairford in Gloucestershire to protest the use of the base by the United States Air Force for operations against Iran. The protest, organised by the Campaig...

item.title: Roelf Meyer’s Appointment as US Ambassador: A Strategic Choice Beyond Racial Narratives
item.description: Roelf Meyer’s appointment as South Africa’s ambassador to the United States has sparked debate, but according to Xolela Mangcu, criticisms based on racial conspiracies and fears of a return to white d...

item.title: Lesser-known Nigerian universities shaping high-performing graduates
item.description: For Nigeria, plenty popular universities dey always take the spotlight, but this report shine light on some lesser-known institutions wey dey quietly produce very strong graduates across different fie...

item.title: ADC and PDP to Present Single Candidate for 2027 Presidential Election
item.description: Ahead of the 2027 general elections, the African Democratic Congress (ADC) and a faction of the People's Democratic Party (PDP) have reached an agreement to field a joint candidate for the presidentia...

item.title: FBI Investigates Disappearance of Naiping Hou, Father of Crypto Investor
item.description: The FBI is investigating the suspicious disappearance of Naiping Hou, a 74-year-old from Rancho Cucamonga, California. His family believes the incident may be linked to the success of his son, Wen Hou...

item.title: Deepti Sharma's all-round performance leads India to victory over Proteas Women
item.description: India’s Deepti Sharma delivered an outstanding all-round performance in the fourth T20I at the Wanderers, guiding India to a 14-run victory over the Proteas Women. Sharma, who had been struggling with...

item.title: Motorcyclist seriously injured after crash with car in Mississauga
item.description: A motorcyclist sustained serious injuries following a collision with a car in Mississauga, prompting an emergency response and road closures in the area. According to Peel Regional Police, the crash o...

item.title: Stormers climb to top of URC standings as Lions secure dominant home win
item.description: The Stormers delivered a commanding performance in Cape Town, beating Glasgow Warriors 48-12 to move to the top of the United Rugby Championship (URC) table with two matches remaining. The bonus-point...
